common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

company.onboarding_intro: Set up your DajSrce company profile in a few steps. You can always skip and finish later.
company.oib_hint: 11 digits. Will be checked against the public company registry.
company.oib_invalid: Invalid OIB — checksum does not match.
company.oib_lookup_failed: Could not reach the company registry — please fill in manually.
company.prior_year_revenue_hint: Used to compute your deduction ceiling.
company.invite_note: We'll send each a one-time invite link valid for 14 days.
company.dashboard_subtitle: Coordinate giving, track impact — all in one place.
company.team_empty: No members yet. Invite your first teammate.
company.team_invite_sent: Invite ready. Copy the link and share it with your colleague.
company.domain_instructions: Add this TXT record to your domain's DNS, then hit 'Verify'.
company.domain_verify_failed: TXT record not yet visible. Try again in 5 minutes.
company.campaigns_empty: No campaigns yet. Launch one to rally your team around a cause.
company.settings_match_ratio_hint: When an employee requests a match, the company auto-adds a matching pledge at this ratio.
company.pledge_match_hint: The company will add a matching pledge if its match ratio is greater than zero.
company.receipts_section_hint: Generate PDF and XML for a fiscal year (paid tier + feature flag required).
company.exports_section_hint: ZIP bundle (CSV, JSON, narrative PDF, evidence) by framework and period. SME Plus: VSME Basic only; Enterprise: all frameworks.
company.csr_section_hint: Branded PDF and DOCX summary for a date range. Uses delivered/confirmed pledges with EUR in the window and company-linked volunteer hours.
company.csr_feature_off: CSR reports and the public company page require NEXT_PUBLIC_FLAG_PUBLIC_PROFILE_ENABLED.
company.public_profile_hint: When enabled, anyone can view /company/your-slug (SME Plus or Enterprise). Sensitive company data stays private.
company.public_profile_embed_hint: Add this script to your site to show a small card:

export.tier_required: SME Plus (VSME Basic) or Enterprise (all frameworks) is required.

pledge.amount_eur_hint: Optional. Needed for annual receipts when pledging on behalf of a company.

institution.volunteers_subtitle: Check volunteers in or out. Hours are logged on check-out. Share the QR code for self check-in.
institution.volunteers_empty: No sign-ups yet. Post a volunteer event first.
institution.pledges_subtitle: Mark goods as received and acknowledge delivery for donor tax records.

receipt.tier_required: SME Tax tier or higher is required.

billing.stripe_missing: Stripe is not configured on the server.
billing.demo_hint: No Stripe: set plan tier for recordings only. Remove ALLOW_DEMO_BILLING in production.

volunteer_self.title: Volunteer check-in
volunteer_self.missing_event: Missing event link. Open the QR code from your organisation again.
volunteer_self.intro: Confirm you have arrived for the volunteer event. You must be signed in and registered for this event.

dashboard_individual.title: Individual Dashboard
dashboard_individual.subtitle: Donation history, volunteer actions, and shipment tracking in one place.
dashboard_individual.no_actions: No actions yet. Browse needs and start helping.
